acceptance_report.source: held-out test (count-banana-plants, aerial UAV, per-plant labels)
acceptance_report.eval_method: raw detector, imgsz=1024, conf=0.25, NMS iou=0.7, greedy IoU>=0.5 matching
acceptance_report.note: REAL figures on held-out aerial test with per-plant labels. Real improvement vs v2 (same method, conf 0.25): F1 0.726->0.811, precision 0.658->0.824, count error 23%->3%; detector mAP50 0.85->0.92. ONE farm/region; another farm requires validation/tuning.

notes: YOLOv8m retrained for density/overlap of plant clumps (imgsz 1024, copy_paste 0.3, mixup 0.1, box loss 8.0, 120 epochs) on count-banana-plants (CC-BY-4.0). Outperforms real-v2.0 on the held-out test using the same evaluation method.
